next_action.description: Resume MPI-64 to CLOSE IT properly (the user wants the close in THIS session). Do NOT close before the user approves. GIT: RunPod is the SHARED v1.1.0 trunk — stage by EXPLICIT PATH, commit your own files, --no-verify, never git add -A.

key_decisions: B3 fix = CreateVideo->SaveVideo split (Output_Video final + Preview preview node + optional Output_Audio gated by MpiHasAudio), app captures videos[]/audio[] by title + muxes server-side. PROVEN remote on L4 (no NVENC, saves+plays).

OOM container self-heals (NOT a Pod death): the ComfyUI PROCESS is OOM-killed + restarted in-place by start.sh; Pod stays alive (Uptime never resets); app re-arms WS on next gen. So 'did we disconnect / did RunPod reconnect?' = we lost the WS, the container restarted ComfyUI, the next gen re-opened the socket. A3 = make the transient-503 a soft toast (comfy_not_ready) vs surface the body (engine_error).
Pod-DEATH recovery (whole Pod terminated) is DROPPED as a tracked validation item — hard to force, addressed reactively if it recurs (avoids a perpetual validation TODO). User decision 2026-06-15.
MPI-64 stays the EPIC/tracker; discrete features spin out as their own cards (MPI-85..92). Phase-5 hardening folded into ONE card (MPI-92). User decision 2026-06-15.
The user explicitly wants MPI-64 CLOSED in the NEXT session (the one resuming from this handoff), NOT the session that wrote this handoff.

M1 mask remote 503 = unbaked SAM/yolo weights (B4 class) — the fix is the MPI-81 image rebuild (USER-run), names already known (no live-discovery needed). The 503-body-surfacing app fix (shipped) makes future unbaked weights self-diagnose.
constraints: RunPod is the SHARED v1.1.0 trunk (concurrent agents). STAGE BY EXPLICIT PATH, commit only your own files, --no-verify, NEVER git add -A. The MPI-85 agent shares comfyController.js + shell.js.
Agents NEVER edit comfy_workflows/*.json — the user owns them (external ComfyUI template). Document injection-title contracts; ask the user to author/re-export.
Backend changes (routes/, server.js, main.js) need a FULL app restart; renderer (js/) reloads with location.reload() in the DevTools console (Ctrl+R blocked).
USER runs ALL live Pod/volume/billing ops + image builds. The L4 + RTX 2000 Pods were STOPPED + DELETED at session end; app shut down. No billing.
Commit only when the USER asks. Closing the card requires explicit user approval.
MPI-81 (image rebuild + weight bake) is its own card, USER-run — interpolate/upscale/mask all 503 remotely until it ships. Do NOT block MPI-64 close on it.
